title: psidium riparium
intro: Psidium riparium, also known as the strawberry guava, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, native to Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Psidium riparium include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Psidium riparium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
